commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f2546468393aa8d17cd5ce86a057db752d423776)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a backup-output directory scan that removes matching `<archive>.<uuid>.tmp` files before writing a new backup and adds unit tests for that helper.

PR surface: Source +70, Tests +117. Total +187 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is clear: current main writes backups through an adjacent `<output>.<uuid>.tmp` and only cleans that exact file during normal unwinding. I did not run an end-to-end timeout scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor branch updates and real behavior proof; automation should not take over while proof is insufficient and the cleanup scope needs maintainer-visible agreement.

target.title: fix(backup): clean up stale .tmp archives from interrupted runs before creating new backup
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
